action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Sheehan, Brown, McCarville, Anderson, Clancy, Stroud, Udell, Arney, Bare, DeSmidt, Hysell, Kirsch, Miresse, Ortiz-Velez, Palmeri, Sinicki, Tenorio, Vining and Andraca; 
cosponsored by Senators Larson, Roys, Hesselbein, Spreitzer, Dassler-Alfheim, Keyeski, Ratcliff, Smith and Wirch
